intents.name: greeting
responses: Hello{user_name}! How can I help you today?
Hi{user_name}! What would you like to talk about?
Hey{user_name}! I am ready to help.

intents.name: farewell
responses: Goodbye{user_name}! Thanks for chatting.
See you later{user_name}. Have a great day!
Take care{user_name}!

intents.name: bot_identity
patterns: \b(who are you|what is your name|what's your name|your name|introduce yourself)\b
responses: I am an intelligent rule-based chatbot built with Python, Flask, regex, fuzzy matching, and JSON storage.
My name is IntelliBot. I answer using rule-based intent detection and conversation context.

intents.name: programming
responses: Programming tip: break the problem into small steps, test each step, and read error messages carefully.
Python is a great language for beginners because its syntax is readable and it has many useful libraries.
For coding help, share the error, the relevant code, and what you expected to happen.

intents.name: time_date
responses: The current date and time is {now}.
Right now it is {now}.

intents.name: math
responses: The answer is {math_result}.
I calculated it as {math_result}.

intents.name: joke
responses: Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs.
Why did the Python developer bring a ladder? To reach a higher level of abstraction.
I told my computer I needed a break, and it opened too many tabs.

intents.name: help
responses: I can chat, answer simple programming questions, tell jokes, calculate basic math, remember your name, respond to mood, and show confidence scores.
Try asking about Python, the current date, a joke, a math problem, or tell me your name.

intents.name: small_talk
patterns: \b(how are you|how is it going|nice to meet you|thank you|thanks)\b
responses: I am doing well and ready to help{user_name}.
Thanks for asking{user_name}. I am running smoothly.
You are welcome{user_name}!

intents.name: mood_feelings
responses: Thanks for sharing that{user_name}. I will remember you are feeling {mood}.
I hear you{user_name}. Feeling {mood} is worth paying attention to.

intents.name: name_capture
responses: Nice to meet you, {captured_name}. I will remember your name.
Got it, {captured_name}. I will call you that.

intents.name: name_recall
patterns: \b(what is my name|what's my name|do you remember my name)\b
responses: Your name is {known_name}.
I remember you as {known_name}.

intents.name: riddle
patterns: \b(riddle|brain teaser|ask me a riddle|tell me a riddle)\b
responses: I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. I have no body, but I come alive with wind. What am I? ... (Answer: An echo)
The more of them you take, the more you leave behind. What are they? ... (Answer: Footsteps)
I have keys but no locks. I have space but no room. You can enter but can't go outside. What am I? ... (Answer: A keyboard)

intents.name: fun_fact
patterns: \b(fun fact|tell me a fact|interesting fact|science fact)\b
responses: Did you know? Honey never spoils. You could theoretically eat 3,000-year-old Egyptian tomb honey!
Did you know? Bananas are berries, but strawberries aren't!
Did you know? The first computer bug was a real moth found trapped in a hardware relay by Grace Hopper in 1947.

intents.name: currency
patterns: \b(convert currency|exchange rate|usd to eur|eur to usd|usd to inr)\b
responses: I am a simple rule-based bot, but here's a mock exchange rate: 1 USD ≈ 0.92 EUR, 1 USD ≈ 83.5 INR. For live rates, please check a financial service!
Exchange Rates (Mock): 1 USD = 0.92 EUR | 1 EUR = 1.09 USD | 1 USD = 83.5 INR.

intents.name: customization
responses: You can change my avatar or theme color using the dashboard panel on the right side!

intents.name: politics
responses: Vijay was now the present cm
Nara Chandra Babu Naidu garu is the present cm for andhra pradesh
The present cm is nara chandra babu naidu garu

fallbacks: I am not fully sure about that yet. You can ask me about programming, jokes, math, time, mood, or help.
I do not have a strong rule for that question yet. I logged it so the developer can improve my intents.
That is outside my current rules, but I can still learn from this interaction through analytics.
